title: Pan-Seared Prawns with German-Style Stew
description: A hearty German-inspired stew paired with pan-seared prawns for a delightful twist.

ingredients.name: stew
ingredients.notes: German-style stew mix with beef broth

instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the caraway seeds and ground beef stew mix.
Stir in beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, dust the prawns with all-purpose flour.
Pan-sear the prawns in a separate skillet with some oil until golden brown.
Serve the pan-seared prawns with the hearty German-style stew.
